name: Los Angeles Luncheon Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sliced fresh mushrooms, cooked shrimp, crushed tarragon leaves, garlic powder, and Italian or herb dressing in a bowl.
2. Chill the mixture for 1 hour to allow flavors to meld together.
3. Arrange individual salad plates with head loose leaf lettuce.
4. Peel, halve, and pit the ripe avocados.
5. Place half of an avocado on each plate.
6. Fill each plate with the chilled mushroom, shrimp, tarragon, garlic dressing mixture.
7. Garnish with cherry tomatoes.
